center.name: 莺科
center.summary: 莺科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括赛氏篱莺、Australian reed warbler、Brown parisoma，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Australian reed warbler perched on reeds The Australian reed warbler (Acrocephalus australis) is an Old World warbler in the genus Acrocephalus and is the only Acrocephalus species native to Australia.{{Cite book|title=Handbook of Australian, New Zealand & Antarctic birds|date=1990–2006|publisher=Oxford University Press|others=Marchant, S., Higgins, P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown parisoma or brown warbler (Curruca lugens) is an Old World warbler of the family Sylviidae found in eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Sykes's warbler (Iduna rama) is an Old World warbler in the tree warbler family
